title: POS Tagging & Named Entity Recognition
code:
import numpy as np

def viterbi_decode(obs, states, start_p, trans_p, emit_p):
    T = len(obs)
    N = len(states)
    viterbi = np.zeros((N, T))
    backpointer = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=int)
    for s in range(N):
        viterbi[s, 0] = start_p[s] * emit_p[s, obs[0]]
    for t in range(1, T):
        for s in range(N):
            prob = viterbi[:, t-1] * trans_p[:, s] * emit_p[s, obs[t]]
            viterbi[s, t] = np.max(prob)
            backpointer[s, t] = np.argmax(prob)
    best_path = []
    state = np.argmax(viterbi[:, T-1])
    best_path.append(state)
    for t in range(T-1, 0, -1):
        state = backpointer[state, t]
        best_path.insert(0, state)
    return best_path, viterbi

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print('POS Viterbi implementation loaded successfully.')
